title: Kadri'Ra
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Species |image=[[File:KadriRa-AE.png]] |name=Kadri'Ra |designation= |class= |subspecies= |races= |height= |length=5–200 [[Meter/Legends|meters]]''[[The Black Sands of Socorro]]'' |wingspan= |mass= |skincolor= |haircolor= |feathers= |eyecolor= |distinctions=Dragon-like''[[Alien Encounters]]'' |lifespan=1000–1500 [[Standard year/Legends|years]] |origin=[[Arapia]] (adopted)
(original [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] unknown) |habitat= |diet= |language=[[Kadri'Ra language|Kadri'Ra]] }} The '''Kadri'Ra''' were a large [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] believed to be related to the [[Duinuogwuin/Legends|Duinuogwuin]]. The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Arapia]] was their adopted [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]]. Like the Duinuogwuin, the Kadri'Ra were a long-lived species, with a natural lifespan of 1,000 to 1,500 [[Standard year/Legends|years]]. Though they shared the Duinuogwuin ability to survive in the [[Vacuum/Legends|vacuum]] of [[Realspace/Legends|space]], the Kadri'Ra could only survive in space for a few days while Duinuogwuin were said to live in vacuum for months at a [[Time/Legends|time]]. Some of the Duinuogwuins' more unusual abilities, like natural [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] flight and biological cold fusion,''[[Galaxy Guide 4: Alien Races]]'' were also absent in the Kadri'Ra. Kadri'Ra continued to grow through their life, reaching lengths of up to two hundred [[Meter/Legends|meters]]. They were protected by a tough [[exoskeleton]], which expanded along with every growth cycle. Older, and therefore larger, Kadri'Ra could become a danger to themselves and others, often retreating to deep caverns or [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] caves, where their exoskeletons conformed to their surroundings. Kadri'Ra were wise and philosophical by nature. Despite this, or perhaps because of it, they were declared a non-sentient [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] species by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Their immense strength and ability to survive vacuum made them popular targets for [[Slavery/Legends|slavers]], who forced them to become heavy laborers in construction projects or space docks. Slavery had reduced the Kadri'Ra population on Arapia from an estimated 140 million during the days of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] to a mere 14,000 by [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]]. The [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitives]] among the Kadri'Ra also suffered, forced to hide their abilities or be killed. [[Saadoon-Kauldi]], a [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] and [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] sympathizer based on [[Neftali/Legends|Neftali]] in the Socorro system, was one of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy's]] prominent Kadri'Ra during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] period. ==Appearances== *{{JournalCite|5|A Bitter Winter|reprint=1}} {{Imo}} {{1stm}} ==Sources== *''[[The Black Sands of Socorro]]'' *''[[Alien Encounters]]'' *{{SW|url=news/drawing-from-the-imagination-mythological-creatures-in-star-wars-part-2|text=Drawing from the Imagination: Mythological Creatures in ''Star Wars'', Part 2|int=Back from the Drawing Board|nolive=1}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Kadri'Ra |fr=Kadri'Ra }} [[Category:Enslaved sentient species]] [[Category:Outer Rim Territories sentient species]] [[Category:Reptilian sentient species]] {{RelatedCategories |[[Category:Kadri'Ra]] }}
